title: OptiBoost
body:
The reason I developed this project was because mine and others were unable to play Minecraft due to their poor computers. So, I came up with an idea and developed this project. More projects will be coming in the future, and this project will continue to receive updates.



**Minecraft But Its Unoptimized Performance**





![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c44ae5319fe4205db5b9ebad3c96d8315a419bc.png)
